source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT 
A.EmployeePK,
A.IncentivePlanID,
A.IncentiveMetricID,
A.Division,
B.IncentiveScaleID,
A.PeriodDate,
A.DistributionType,
NULL AS Pct_IncentivePoolEarned,
NULL AS EligibleIncentiveTarget,
A.TargetValue,
A.ActualValue,
CASE 
WHEN A.ActualValue IS NOT NULL AND A.ActualValue!=0.00 
        THEN 
            (   CASE 
                    WHEN ( A.TargetValue IS NULL OR A.TargetValue =0)  THEN A.ActualValue
                    ELSE (A.ActualValue * 1.00 / A.TargetValue * 1.00)
                END
                )

ELSE NULL END AS  PerformanceRatio,
NULL AS EarnedIncentiveAmount,
'N' AS SalaryChangeFlag,
GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTS

FROM EDW_INC.FACT_INCENTIVE_METRICS_RESULT A
JOIN EDW_INC.DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_ALLOCATION B
ON   A.IncentivePlanID   = B.IncentivePlanID
AND  A.IncentiveMetricID = B.IncentiveMetricID

scripts.text:
--############# TEMP TABLES ###############

-- BONUS POOLS 

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_BONUS_POOL_RAW') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE #T_BONUS_POOL_RAW;
	

SELECT DISTINCT
	A.PeriodDate,
	A.IncentiveMetricID,
	A.EmployeePK,
	A.Division,
	A.DistributionType,
	B.BaseSalary,
	B.Pct_TargetBonus,
	B.EligibleIncentiveTarget,
	CASE 
		WHEN A.DistributionType='MONTHLY'	THEN ( (C.AllocationPct *  B.EligibleIncentiveTarget ) / 12 ) 
		END AS MonthlyBonusPool,
	CASE 
		WHEN A.DistributionType='QUARTERLY' THEN ( (C.AllocationPct *  B.EligibleIncentiveTarget ) / 4 ) 
		END AS QuarterlyBonusPool,
	CASE
		WHEN A.DistributionType='YEARLY'	THEN ( (C.AllocationPct *  B.EligibleIncentiveTarget )  ) 
		END AS YearlyBonusPool
		
	INTO #T_BONUS_POOL_RAW
		
	FROM 
	EDW_INC.FACT_INCENTIVE_METRICS_RESULT A
	JOIN [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_ELIGIBLE_EMPLOYEE] B
	ON A.EmployeePK = B.EmployeePK
	AND A.Division  = B.Division
	AND A.IncentivePlanID = B.IncentivePlanID
	
	JOIN EDW_INC.DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_ALLOCATION C
	ON A.IncentivePlanID  =  C.IncentivePlanID
	AND A.IncentiveMetricID  = C.IncentiveMetricID
	AND A.DistributionType  = C.DistributionType;


--****************************************


IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_ELIGIBLE_BONUS_BY_METRIC') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE #T_ELIGIBLE_BONUS_BY_METRIC;

SELECT 
PeriodDate,
EmployeePK,
IncentiveMetricID,
Division,
EligibleIncentiveTarget,
SUM(COALESCE(MonthlyBonusPool,0.00))	AS MonthlyBonusPool,
SUM(COALESCE(QuarterlyBonusPool,0.00))	AS QuarterlyBonusPool,
SUM(COALESCE(YearlyBonusPool,0.00))		AS YearlyBonusPool,
SUM(COALESCE(MonthlyBonusPool,0.00) + COALESCE(QuarterlyBonusPool,0.00) + COALESCE(YearlyBonusPool,0.00)) AS BonusPool

INTO #T_ELIGIBLE_BONUS_BY_METRIC

FROM #T_BONUS_POOL_RAW
GROUP BY
PeriodDate,
EmployeePK,
IncentiveMetricID,
Division,
EligibleIncentiveTarget;


--**************************************

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_ELIGIBLE_BONUS_MONTHLY') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #T_ELIGIBLE_BONUS_MONTHLY;


SELECT 
PeriodDate,
EmployeePK,
Division,
EligibleIncentiveTarget,
SUM(COALESCE(MonthlyBonusPool,0.00))	AS MonthlyBonusPool,
SUM(COALESCE(QuarterlyBonusPool,0.00))	AS QuarterlyBonusPool,
SUM(COALESCE(YearlyBonusPool,0.00))		AS YearlyBonusPool,
SUM(COALESCE(MonthlyBonusPool,0.00) + COALESCE(QuarterlyBonusPool,0.00) + COALESCE(YearlyBonusPool,0.00)) AS BonusPool

INTO #T_ELIGIBLE_BONUS_MONTHLY

FROM #T_BONUS_POOL_RAW
GROUP BY
PeriodDate,
EmployeePK,
Division,
EligibleIncentiveTarget;



--############### TEMP TABLES END #############

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_UPDATE_TARGET_HIGHER') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #T_UPDATE_TARGET_HIGHER;


SELECT *,
(Pct_IncentivePoolEarned * BonusPool ) AS EarnedIncentiveAmount

INTO #T_UPDATE_TARGET_HIGHER

FROM 
(
		SELECT 
		A.EmployeePK	,
		A.IncentivePlanID	,
		A.IncentiveMetricID	,
		A.Division	,
		A.PeriodDate	,
		A.DistributionType,
		A.PerformanceRatio,
		B.LowerBound,
		B.UpperBound,
		M.MetricDirection AS ScaleDirection,
		B.BandOrder,
		CASE 
			WHEN OVR.Pct_MinPayout IS NOT NULL 
			THEN 
				CASE 
					WHEN OVR.Pct_MinPayout > COALESCE(CAST(B.Pct_IncentivePoolEarned AS DECIMAL(16,4)),0.00) THEN Pct_MinPayout 
					ELSE B.Pct_IncentivePoolEarned 
				END 
			ELSE B.Pct_IncentivePoolEarned 
		END
			AS Pct_IncentivePoolEarned,
			
		C.BonusPool
		--( B.Pct_IncentivePoolEarned * C.BonusPool ) AS EarnedIncentiveAmount
		
		
		FROM EDW_INC.FACT_INCENTIVE_EARNED_MONTHLY A 
		JOIN EDW_INC.REF_INCENTIVE_SCALE  B
		ON   A.IncentiveScaleID   = B.ScaleID
		
		JOIN [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_ELIGIBLE_EMPLOYEE] EMP 
		ON A.EmployeePK = EMP.EmployeePK
		
		JOIN [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRICS] M 
		ON A.IncentiveMetricID = M.IncentiveMetricID
		
		JOIN #T_ELIGIBLE_BONUS_BY_METRIC C
		ON 	A.EmployeePK 		= C.EmployeePK
		AND A.IncentiveMetricID = C.IncentiveMetricID
		AND A.PeriodDate 		= C.PeriodDate
		
		--**** Override at Metric Level 
		
		LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM [EDW_INC].[REF_EMPLOYEE_MIN_BONUS_PAYOUT] WHERE MetricLevelOverrideFlag='Y' ) OVR   
		ON EMP.EmployeeID 		= OVR.EmployeeID
		AND A.PeriodDate  		= OVR.PeriodDate
		AND A.DistributionType 	= OVR.DistributionType
		AND A.IncentiveMetricID = OVR.MetricName
		
		WHERE ( A.PerformanceRatio >=B.LowerBound AND A.PerformanceRatio < B.UpperBound )
		AND M.MetricDirection = 'HIGHER_BETTER'
		
		) M1;






IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_UPDATE_TARGET_LOWER') IS NOT NULL
   DROP TABLE #T_UPDATE_TARGET_LOWER;



SELECT *,
(Pct_IncentivePoolEarned * BonusPool ) AS EarnedIncentiveAmount

INTO #T_UPDATE_TARGET_LOWER

FROM 
(
		SELECT 
		A.EmployeePK	,
		A.IncentivePlanID	,
		A.IncentiveMetricID	,
		A.Division	,
		A.PeriodDate	,
		A.DistributionType,
		A.PerformanceRatio,
		B.LowerBound,
		B.UpperBound,
		M.MetricDirection AS ScaleDirection,
		B.BandOrder,
		CASE 
			WHEN OVR.Pct_MinPayout IS NOT NULL 
			THEN 
				CASE 
					WHEN OVR.Pct_MinPayout > COALESCE(CAST(B.Pct_IncentivePoolEarned AS DECIMAL(16,4)),0.00) THEN Pct_MinPayout 
					ELSE B.Pct_IncentivePoolEarned 
				END 
			ELSE B.Pct_IncentivePoolEarned 
		END
			AS Pct_IncentivePoolEarned,
			
		C.BonusPool
		--( B.Pct_IncentivePoolEarned * C.BonusPool ) AS EarnedIncentiveAmount
		
		
		FROM EDW_INC.FACT_INCENTIVE_EARNED_MONTHLY A 
		JOIN EDW_INC.REF_INCENTIVE_SCALE  B
		ON   A.IncentiveScaleID   = B.ScaleID
		
		JOIN [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_ELIGIBLE_EMPLOYEE] EMP 
		ON A.EmployeePK = EMP.EmployeePK
		
		JOIN [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRICS] M 
		ON A.IncentiveMetricID = M.IncentiveMetricID
		
		JOIN #T_ELIGIBLE_BONUS_BY_METRIC C
		ON 	A.EmployeePK 		= C.EmployeePK
		AND A.IncentiveMetricID = C.IncentiveMetricID
		AND A.PeriodDate 		= C.PeriodDate
		
		--**** Override at Metric Level 
		
		LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM [EDW_INC].[REF_EMPLOYEE_MIN_BONUS_PAYOUT] WHERE MetricLevelOverrideFlag='Y' ) OVR   
		ON EMP.EmployeeID 		= OVR.EmployeeID
		AND A.PeriodDate  		= OVR.PeriodDate
		AND A.DistributionType 	= OVR.DistributionType
		AND A.IncentiveMetricID = OVR.MetricName
		
		WHERE ( A.PerformanceRatio <= B.LowerBound AND A.PerformanceRatio > B.UpperBound )
		AND M.MetricDirection = 'LOWER_BETTER'
		
		) M1;




/*

SELECT 
A.EmployeePK	,
A.IncentivePlanID	,
A.IncentiveMetricID	,
A.Division	,
A.PeriodDate	,
A.DistributionType,
A.PerformanceRatio,
B.LowerBound,
B.UpperBound,
M.MetricDirection AS ScaleDirection,
B.BandOrder,
B.Pct_IncentivePoolEarned,
C.BonusPool,
( B.Pct_IncentivePoolEarned * C.BonusPool ) AS EarnedIncentiveAmount

INTO #T_UPDATE_TARGET_LOWER

FROM EDW_INC.FACT_INCENTIVE_EARNED_MONTHLY A 
JOIN EDW_INC.REF_INCENTIVE_SCALE  B
ON   A.IncentiveScaleID   = B.ScaleID

JOIN [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRICS] M 
ON A.IncentiveMetricID = M.IncentiveMetricID

JOIN #T_ELIGIBLE_BONUS_BY_METRIC C
ON 	A.EmployeePK 		= C.EmployeePK
AND A.IncentiveMetricID = C.IncentiveMetricID
AND A.PeriodDate 		= C.PeriodDate

WHERE ( A.PerformanceRatio <= B.LowerBound AND A.PerformanceRatio > B.UpperBound )
AND M.MetricDirection = 'LOWER_BETTER';

*/




UPDATE M1 
SET M1.EarnedIncentiveAmount = M2.EarnedIncentiveAmount ,
M1.Pct_IncentivePoolEarned	= M2.Pct_IncentivePoolEarned
FROM EDW_INC.FACT_INCENTIVE_EARNED_MONTHLY M1
JOIN #T_UPDATE_TARGET_HIGHER M2
ON
	M1.EmployeePK	           = M2.EmployeePK	
AND M1.IncentivePlanID	       = M2.IncentivePlanID	
AND M1.IncentiveMetricID       = M2.IncentiveMetricID
AND M1.Division	               = M2.Division	
AND M1.PeriodDate	           = M2.PeriodDate	
AND M1.DistributionType        = M2.DistributionType;




UPDATE M1 
SET M1.EarnedIncentiveAmount = M2.EarnedIncentiveAmount ,
M1.Pct_IncentivePoolEarned	= M2.Pct_IncentivePoolEarned
FROM EDW_INC.FACT_INCENTIVE_EARNED_MONTHLY M1
JOIN #T_UPDATE_TARGET_LOWER M2
ON
	M1.EmployeePK	           = M2.EmployeePK	
AND M1.IncentivePlanID	       = M2.IncentivePlanID	
AND M1.IncentiveMetricID       = M2.IncentiveMetricID
AND M1.Division	               = M2.Division	
AND M1.PeriodDate	           = M2.PeriodDate	
AND M1.DistributionType        = M2.DistributionType;



UPDATE M1
SET M1.EligibleIncentiveTarget = M2.BonusPool
FROM EDW_INC.FACT_INCENTIVE_EARNED_MONTHLY M1
JOIN #T_ELIGIBLE_BONUS_BY_METRIC M2
ON 	M1.EmployeePK 		= M2.EmployeePK
AND M1.IncentiveMetricID = M2.IncentiveMetricID
AND M1.PeriodDate 		= M2.PeriodDate;


UPDATE EDW_INC.FACT_INCENTIVE_EARNED_MONTHLY SET EarnedIncentiveAmount = 0.00 WHERE EarnedIncentiveAmount IS NULL;

--########################################
--  SalaryChangeFlag   UPDATE
--########################################


SELECT EmployeePK 
INTO #T_EMP
FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_ELIGIBLE_EMPLOYEE] 
	WHERE EmployeeID IN 
	(SELECT EmployeeID FROM 
		(
		SELECT EmployeeID,COUNT(1) AS CT FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_ELIGIBLE_EMPLOYEE]
		GROUP BY EmployeeID
		HAVING COUNT(1)>1
			) A1
		); 


UPDATE [EDW_INC].[FACT_INCENTIVE_EARNED_MONTHLY] 
SET SalaryChangeFlag = 'Y'
WHERE  EmployeePK IN 
(SELECT EmployeePK FROM  #T_EMP	);
	



--########################################
--  Adjustment Pro-Rated   UPDATE
--########################################



WITH BASE AS 
(

	SELECT 
	A.EmployeePK
	,A.IncentiveMetricID
	,A.PeriodDate
	,A.DistributionType
	,A.EligibleIncentiveTarget
	,A.EarnedIncentiveAmount
	,B.EffectiveFrom
	,B.EffectiveTo
	FROM [EDW_INC].[FACT_INCENTIVE_EARNED_MONTHLY] A
	LEFT JOIN [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_ELIGIBLE_EMPLOYEE] B
	ON A.EmployeePK = B.EmployeePK
	--WHERE A.SalaryChangeFlag = 'Y'  Do it for all Employee which might start with Organization in mid-financial year

),

PeriodBounds AS (
    SELECT
        EmployeePK,
        IncentiveMetricID,
        PeriodDate,
        DistributionType,
        EligibleIncentiveTarget,
        EarnedIncentiveAmount,
        EffectiveFrom,
        EffectiveTo,

        -- Derive period start from PeriodDate and DistributionType
        CASE
            WHEN DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'
                THEN DATEADD(DAY, 1, EOMONTH(PeriodDate, -1))   -- 1st of same month
            WHEN DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'
                THEN DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER, 0, PeriodDate), 0)  -- 1st of quarter
            WHEN DistributionType = 'YEARLY'
                THEN DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(PeriodDate), 1, 1)       -- Jan 1 of year
        END AS PeriodStartDate,

        PeriodDate AS PeriodEndDate  -- already the last day of the period

    FROM BASE
),
ProrationCalc AS (
    SELECT
        *,

        -- Total calendar days in the period
        DATEDIFF(DAY, PeriodStartDate, PeriodEndDate) + 1 AS TotalPeriodDays,

        -- Overlap start: later of EffectiveFrom vs PeriodStart
        CASE
            WHEN EffectiveFrom > PeriodStartDate THEN EffectiveFrom
            ELSE PeriodStartDate
        END AS OverlapStart,

        -- Overlap end: earlier of EffectiveTo vs PeriodEnd
        CASE
            WHEN EffectiveTo < PeriodEndDate THEN EffectiveTo
            ELSE PeriodEndDate
        END AS OverlapEnd

    FROM PeriodBounds
),
Final AS (
    SELECT
        *,

        -- Days of effective coverage within this period (0 if no overlap)
        CASE
            WHEN OverlapEnd < OverlapStart THEN 0
            ELSE DATEDIFF(DAY, OverlapStart, OverlapEnd) + 1
        END AS EffectiveDaysInPeriod,

        -- Proration factor (0.00 to 1.00)
        CAST(
            CASE
                WHEN OverlapEnd < OverlapStart THEN 0.0
                ELSE (DATEDIFF(DAY, OverlapStart, OverlapEnd) + 1) * 1.0 / TotalPeriodDays
            END
        AS DECIMAL(10, 4)) AS ProratedFactor

    FROM ProrationCalc
)

SELECT
    EmployeePK,
    IncentiveMetricID,
    PeriodDate,
    DistributionType,
    EligibleIncentiveTarget,
    EarnedIncentiveAmount,
    EffectiveFrom,
    EffectiveTo,
    PeriodStartDate,
    PeriodEndDate,
    TotalPeriodDays,
    EffectiveDaysInPeriod,
    ProratedFactor,

    -- Adjusted earned incentive
    ROUND(EarnedIncentiveAmount * ProratedFactor, 4) AS AdjustedEarnedIncentiveAmount,
	ROUND(EligibleIncentiveTarget * ProratedFactor, 4) AS AdjustedEligibleIncentiveTarget
INTO #T_FINAL

FROM Final;




--########################################
--*********** UPDATE TO Table ***********
--########################################



UPDATE M1 
SET 
M1.EligibleIncentiveTarget = M2.AdjustedEligibleIncentiveTarget,
M1.EarnedIncentiveAmount   = M2.AdjustedEarnedIncentiveAmount

FROM [EDW_INC].[FACT_INCENTIVE_EARNED_MONTHLY] M1 
JOIN #T_FINAL M2 
ON 
	M1.EmployeePK				=	 M2.EmployeePK		
AND M1.IncentiveMetricID		=    M2.IncentiveMetricID
AND M1.PeriodDate				=    M2.PeriodDate		
AND M1.DistributionType			=    M2.DistributionType	;

--WHERE M1.SalaryChangeFlag = 'Y';




UPDATE M1 
SET 
M1.TargetValue 				= 0.00,
M1.ActualValue   			= 0.00,
M1.PerformanceRatio 		= 0.00,
M1.Pct_IncentivePoolEarned 	= 0.00

FROM [EDW_INC].[FACT_INCENTIVE_EARNED_MONTHLY] M1 
JOIN #T_FINAL M2 
ON 
	M1.EmployeePK				=	 M2.EmployeePK		
AND M1.IncentiveMetricID		=    M2.IncentiveMetricID
AND M1.PeriodDate				=    M2.PeriodDate		
AND M1.DistributionType			=    M2.DistributionType	

WHERE --M1.SalaryChangeFlag = 'Y'
--AND 
M2.ProratedFactor = 0.00;
